center.name: 哈拉雷
center.summary: 哈拉雷是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Boulder chat，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: (21294239804).jpg | image_caption = At Lake Chivero, Harare, Zimbabwe | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Pinarornis | parent_authority = Sharpe, 1876 | species = plumosus | authority = Sharpe, 1876 }} The boulder chat (Pinarornis plumosus) is a species of bird in the thrush family Turdidae native to dry woodland and savanna in Southern Africa
